channel.title: database on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in database on My Hugo

item.title: nosql
item.description: GitHub - techfort/LokiJS: javascript embeddable / in-memory database Introduction — TinyDB 3.12.2 documentation GraphQL | A query language for your API Why You Should Never Use MongoDB « Sarah Mei ORM vs. SQL: When should I use a SQL-centric persistence layer? | techscouting through the java news ORM or SQL: Are We There Yet? ~ C for Coding UnQLite - An Embeddable NoSQL Database Engine sophia - modern transactional key-value/row storage library.

item.title: odbc+jdbc
item.description: ODBC Asynchronous Execution ODBC API Reference ODBC Programmer's Reference ODBC Function Summary | Microsoft Docs www.contrib.andrew.cmu.edu/~shadow/sql/sql1992.txt ODBC-Specification/ODBC 4.0.md at master · Microsoft/ODBC-Specification · GitHub ODBC 4 Community Preview - Simba Technologies JDBC Java JDBC Tutorial - javatpoint xerial / sqlite-jdbc — Bitbucket Connect To The SQLite Database Using SQLite JDBC Driver PostgreSQL JDBC Download JDBC Tutorial c3p0-v0.9.5.2 - JDBC3 Connection and Statement Pooling - Documentation What Is jvisualvm (Java VisualVM)? Apache Commons – Apache Commons Top 9 Java Programming Books - Best of lot, Must Read The PostgreSQL™ JDBC Interface java.
